name: indi-focuser-PETG
description: PETG filament profile for the indi-focuser-esp32s3 motor mount parts. Tuned for outdoor-rated structural and gear prints on Bambu Lab H2S.
notes: Textured PEI plate recommended. Clean plate with IPA before each print. Dry filament at 65C for 4-6 hours before printing gears. PETG sticks aggressively to smooth PEI — use textured plate only.
